stemHtml: Which of the following statements is true about the movement of the ITCZ?

options.a: It varies less over the oceans than over land because the temperature over the oceans varies less.
options.b: It varies more over the oceans than over land because the temperature over land varies less.
options.c: It varies less over the oceans due to the gulf current.
options.d: It varies very little over the oceans because of cold sea currents.
